name: Green Shield Bug

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It closes in slowly and snaps with a short head bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it from the front or do not let it corner you between clouds.
attacks.notes: It uses this less than gas, but it is the follow-up when you are already boxed in.

attacks.name: Massive Toxic Cloud
attacks.tell: It raises its rear and exhales a green cloud far larger than a normal stinkbug's.
attacks.howToAvoid: Create distance immediately and wait outside the radius before stepping back in.
attacks.notes: Its main space-denial tool and the biggest drain on gas mask durability.

attacks.name: Gas Leap
attacks.tell: It hops backward or sideways and leaves gas covering the space where it finishes the move.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not chase the reposition immediately; let the gas spread finish first.
attacks.notes: It uses this to keep you in gas while creating space for itself.

description: A much deadlier version of the stinkbug built to rule the upper yard around the shed. Its real threat is not just damage, but how much space it can deny with gas.
behavior: It wanders in secluded spaces and releases fumes even outside of combat. Once engaged, it favors gas far more than bites and can leap backward to keep you inside its clouds.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile as soon as it notices the player. Without a gas mask, Gastro Goo, or a similar answer, the fight quickly becomes a race against durability and damage over time.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually ignores other creatures until one of its gas clouds clips them by accident. Once that happens, many species retaliate immediately.
strategy: Gas control is the first priority, not greed for damage. Fresh performs extremely well, but bringing gas protection completely changes the fight and lets you punish the leap and bite windows much more safely.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 100
Gas Leap: 125
Toxic Clouds: very high damage over time

specialTraits: It is immune to gas. Multiple clouds can overlap and make the area lethal even while only one bug is still alive.
